known_gaps: Strong on distribution and channel connectivity, but the direct booking widget and checkout flow has limited customisation options
Manifest functionality is basic — limited ability to add custom fields per product type
Pricing can be steep for smaller operators relative to booking volume
Support response times can be slow for operators outside core European markets
Reporting on direct vs OTA channel performance is harder to pull without manual work
discovery_questions: You're on Bokun — how are you finding the direct booking side versus the OTA channel distribution piece?
Are there things you wish the booking form or manifest captured that Bokun doesn't currently support?
How are you tracking which channels are actually performing for you?
fareharbor_comparison: More flexible booking form and manifest customisation per activity type
No monthly fee — pay per booking only, so cost scales with volume
Stronger direct booking conversion tools and checkout customisation
